---
title: "CV"
output: 
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
date: "2026-07-01"
---
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat('<iframe src="CV_DANIEL.pdf#toolbar=0&navpanes=0&zoom=page-fit" width="100%" height="100%" style="border:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0;"></iframe>')
```
